title: Model + cancer-data license/de-identification gate (blocking checklist)
context: Before any open cancer ML model can be documented, both the model artifact and every training/eval dataset must pass a mandatory license and de-identification gate. Without a formal, committed gate checklist, reviewers could apply different standards leading to license misclassification — a high-impact risk. This blocking checklist is a prerequisite for all per-model card tasks and the pilot. Depends on schema-001.
objective: Design and publish the model + cancer-data license/de-identification gate: a non-skippable, auditable checklist that produces a committed PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact for each candidate model, enforcing the project's binding cancer guardrails.
acceptanceCriteria: Checklist enforces open-access/aggregate/de-identified data only: controlled-access sources (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and identifiable patient data are auto-EXCLUDE (or stub-only, with reason recorded).

Objective license criterion: PASS only if model permitsDerivatives:true AND every dataset permitsUse:true, each backed by a cited license clause/URL; missing or unparseable evidence = FLAG/EXCLUDE (no default-allow). NC/share-alike cases deferred to ncpolicy-004.

Requires recording each license id, URL, snapshot reference (committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback), the data access tier, and the de-identification method as documented by the data provider (never de-identified by this project).
Encodes the model and eval-data access protocol: text artifacts primary; reproduce only on open de-identified eval data; local/ephemeral; commit aggregates only; halt on access barrier or PII signal.
Produces a committed PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact per model recording which checks ran, what fired, and the rationale.
Gate document reviewed and approved by the Data-License+Privacy reviewer before any triage task begins.
resources: PLAN.md — Data, licensing & compliance section (binding cancer guardrails)
output: A committed gate checklist document (and associated artifact template) defining the blocking PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE criteria for model + cancer-data license/de-identification triage.
